/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DuckH.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o DuckH.app/Contents/MacOS/DuckH  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/glfw/lib-arm64 -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreGraphics -framework ImageIO -framework QuartzCore /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /usr/local/glfw/lib-arm64/libglfw.3.dylib
